visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a patterned flat cap, and a mustard-colored hoodie stands in a studio setting with a gray background. He gestures towards the camera while speaking. (2) A static, high-contrast close-up of a person's face from the nose down, wearing glasses and a formal suit with a tie, appears briefly. (3) A 3D animation of the LINE app icon, chat bubbles, and a green notification bell is shown against a red and gray background. (4) A series of screen recordings of a smartphone interface display various settings within the LINE application, specifically the 'Friends', 'Privacy', and 'Account' menus. Red arrows and green highlighted boxes emphasize specific toggles. (5) The man from the first phase returns to the frame, pointing his finger at the camera in an emphatic gesture before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 您精采生活的好鄰居. [Slogan]: 關閉這六個選項. (2) [Subtitle]: 日本資深的數位資訊編輯. (3) [Subtitle]: 統整了LINE六個. [Subtitle]: 應該要關閉的選項. (4) [Subtitle]: 第一個 關閉的加入好友. [Subtitle]: 以及允許被加入好友. (5) [Subtitle]: 第二個 關閉什麼. [Subtitle]: 允許利用ID加入好友. (6) [Subtitle]: 第三個要關閉什麼. [Subtitle]: 從應用程式存取資訊. (7) [Subtitle]: 第四個. [Subtitle]: 允許其他裝置登錄. (8) [Subtitle]: 第五個關閉. [Subtitle]: 顯示訊息內容. (9) [Subtitle]: 第六個 最後要關閉什麼. [Subtitle]: 提供情報給LINE.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a man with glasses, wearing a checkered flat cap and a mustard-yellow hoodie with a graphic design on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a neutral gray studio wall. Secondary backgrounds include 3D graphics and mobile app interface screens.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced male vocal with high arousal and authoritative tone begins immediately, accompanied by an upbeat, electronic-pop BGM with a strong percussive beat. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals the transition to the graphic. (3) The vocal continues listing steps at a rapid rate; every screen transition is marked by a high-frequency 'pop' or 'ding' UI SFX. (4) The BGM remains constant in volume and tempo throughout the instructional sequence. (5) The final vocal delivery is emphatic and loud, ending with a clean hard cut on both vocal and music tracks.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a tech safety tutorial designed to educate users on how to protect their LINE messaging account privacy. It provides a structured list of six specific settings to disable, using screen recordings for visual guidance and an energetic narration to keep the viewer engaged with the high-density information.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Brand logos for 'miko' are prominently displayed throughout the video in the top left corner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-frequency editing and on-screen graphics to maintain viewer attention during technical instructions.
